name: google-colab
description: Connect AI agents to Google Colab notebooks with GPU runtimes (T4/L4). Use for ML/data work.
install_note: Requires: git, python, uv package manager. Run: pip install uv
when_to_install: When doing ML/data science work that needs GPU compute or notebook integration
add_to_settings: Copy the 'config' block into ~/.claude/settings.json under mcpServers.google-colab
